buttons.primary: bg-[#4A0E0E] text-[#FDFBF7] px-8 py-3 rounded-none border border-[#4A0E0E] hover:bg-transparent hover:text-[#4A0E0E] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#4A0E0E] px-8 py-3 rounded-none border border-[#4A0E0E] hover:bg-[#4A0E0E] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-[#E5DED0] hover:border-[#D4AF37] p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

hero_macro.description: Close up of luminous flame for hero section atmosphere

texture_overlay.description: Use as low opacity background overlay for 'Pedigree' section

service_vastu.description: Minimalist luxury interior for Vastu Shanti service

service_ritual.description: Decorated copper kalash for wealth rituals

service_fire.description: Fire ritual in woven basket for health rituals

hero.layout: Two column: Left Text (Serif Headline), Right Image (Macro Flame or Kalash)
elements: Headline: 'Sanctify Your Space with Vedic Precision'
Subhead: 'Authentic rituals by 20-year Gurukul scholars for the discerning home.'

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a SINGLE file named 'landing.html' in the '/app/frontend/public/' directory (or root if preferred).
Configure Tailwind theme in the script tag to match the colors provided.
Use Google Fonts for Playfair Display and Inter.
Do NOT use the existing React App structure for this specific request, as the user asked for a standalone HTML file.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons and interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Avoid gradients, use solid colors or subtle texture overlays.
Use 'lenis' or smooth scroll CSS behavior.
